FOR FINANCE

Your AI Associate
on the Deal Team

From financial models to IC memos, Associum compresses days of work into hours, without cutting corners on precision or quality.

Start for Free Explore Enterprise Solutions

An AI-powered end-to-end workflow

Associum's agents manage the entire workflow of research and analysis, from raw inputs to a near-final deliverable you can edit and send.

01

Data Ingestion

Upload documents and datasets from any source. Associum reads, classifies, and enriches every file with third-party data and deep web research.

Unstructured → Understanding
02

Data extraction

Key financials, figures, risks, and data points are extracted and indexed, each traced to its exact source document and page.

Data → Evidence
03

Research synthesis

Findings are structured into coherent, investment-grade sections calibrated to your output type, role, and firm standard.

Information → Insight
04

Document generation

Associum produces a near-final memo, tearsheet, or report, formatted and structured, ready for your analytical review.

Insight → Draft
05

Edit and send

Refine the output in-platform. Adjust the thesis, sharpen the narrative, apply firm conventions. Every element is editable before it leaves your hands.

Draft → Decision
WHO IT IS FOR

Built for every finance role

Associum handles the document work across the full spectrum of finance professionals, each with distinct outputs and workflows.

RESEARCH

Go deep, quickly as markets, companies, and new trends evolve.

Associum pulls data from your trusted sources with deep web research to produce a well-cited fact base for your analysis and judgment.

WHAT ASSOCIUM HANDLES

  • Pulls data from multiple trusted data sources autonomously.
  • Cross-references past trends and proposes a thesis.
  • Drafts a near-final, well-cited report, based on your templates
  • Your analysis, your judgment completes the view.
SAMPLE OUTPUT
Market Research Report

Multi-source synthesis structured into a cited, near-final research deliverable.

SOURCE- TRUTH INSIGHT

Every number traces back to its source.

Associum does not generate figures from context or inference. Every data point in the output is extracted directly from the documents you uploaded, cited back to the exact page and section it came from.

Results from deep web research and third-party data sources are also integrated inline with documents for confirmation.

You review the work. You verify the sources. The judgment stays with you.

WORKFLOW AUTOMATION

The work Associum handles

Associum's agents manage the entire workflow of research and analysis, helping you and your clients make high-stakes decisions with better information, faster. Your judgement and decision-making, Associum's support in building conviction.

WITHOUT ASSOCIUM

You dive into the dataroom - reading, cross-referencing, confirming, and drafting.

Read every filing Extract figures Cross-reference the model Chase missing data Build the memo outline Source comparable transactions Draft section by section Format to house style Add citations Tie out the numbers Reformat after feedback
WITH ASSOCIUM

You provide direction and context. Associum handles the rest.

Research Synthesis Drafting Citations Formatting

You review the draft

Accurate, cited and ready for review

More time for what really matters.

Spend your time on analysis, thesis refinement, and client impact.

Common Questions from Finance Professionals

Yes. Associum is built to handle CIMs, data room PDFs, SEC filings, earnings transcripts, research reports, and financial model outputs. It reads the full document, not just the first few pages.

Every data point and claim in an Associum output is traced back to a specific source document, page, and section. If it can't find something in the documents you've uploaded, it won't invent it.

Associum is SOC 2 certified and ISO 27001 compliant. Your documents are never used to train any AI model. Data handling details are available on our Security page.

Most users have a structured first draft (memo, tearsheet, or summary) within 20–30 minutes of uploading their documents, depending on document volume.

No setup required. Upload your documents and start. For teams that want outputs in a specific house format, templates can be configured, but it works out of the box from day one.

Still have a question? Use the form on our Contact page and we'll be in touch within one business day.

From data to near-final draft.
In one environment.

Free to start. No credit card required.

Associum

The AI Associate for Professionals. Built by former investors, consultants, and engineers.

SOC2 Type II
